Artistic Patronage. Throughout his life, Cosimo devoted attention to the arts. Like other prominent Renaissance citizens, the Medici purchased artwork for public display and private use. They often hired artists such as Lorenzo Ghiberti, Donatello, and Fra Angelico to produce important pieces.
